meta.title: Roads to a Free Syria: Nasser Rabbat
meta.description: Nasser Rabbat, Aga Khan Professor at MIT, looks at the situation in Syria from the Syrian perspective. He explains that most people in the country want a moderate and modern form of religiosity, and talks about cultural exchange between Syria and the West.
